Get the App

Ride with Pride

Become a Turtu Delivery Partner. Earn more, work flexibly, and be the pulse of your city.

Why join Turtu Riders?

💰 Weekly Payouts

Get your hard-earned money every week directly to your account.

⏰ Flexible Hours

Choose when you want to login and logout. You are your own boss.

🛡️ Safety Cover

Turtu provides medical insurance coverage for all active riders.

Ready to Start?

Download the Delivery Partner App and register in 5 minutes.

Download APK Play Store

Requirements: Smartphone, Two-Wheeler, Driving License, Aadhaar Card.
